examples.title: Categorize temperature with else-if ranges
examples.description: Demonstrates ordered else-if chains and boundary checks to select exactly one category.
examples.pseudocode:
INPUT temp
IF temp < 0
    PRINT "Freezing"
ELSE IF temp < 10
    PRINT "Cold"
ELSE IF temp < 25
    PRINT "Mild"
ELSE IF temp < 35
    PRINT "Warm"
ELSE
    PRINT "Hot"
END IF

examples.title: Leap year check with logical operators
examples.description: Shows combining && and || with correct precedence and parentheses.
examples.pseudocode:
INPUT year
IF (year mod 400 == 0) OR (year mod 4 == 0 AND year mod 100 != 0)
    PRINT "Leap"
ELSE
    PRINT "Common"
END IF

examples.title: Guard clause for safe division
examples.description: Illustrates early return to handle invalid input before main logic, preventing divide-by-zero.
examples.pseudocode:
FUNCTION safeDivide(a, b)
    IF b == 0
        PRINT "Cannot divide by zero"
        RETURN 0
    END IF
    RETURN a / b
END FUNCTION
